title: Clothing Designer for Men & Women's Wear
brief: Shangri-La Capsule Apparel Collection — Fall & Spring 2027 Project Snapshot Client: Shangri-La — vertically integrated cannabis retailer (Connecticut, Ohio, Missouri) Engagement: Fixed-price, not to exceed $10,000 total Deliverable: A production-ready apparel design system for a branded retail capsule — sold in-store and offered as loyalty-program redemption Markets: Connecticut, Ohio, Missouri. Every design must be compliant and sellable across all three states with no rework. We will not produce single-state SKUs. Seasons: Fall 2027 and Spring 2027 drops, designed together in this engagement Objective Design a cohesive, production-ready capsule across two seasonal drops (Fall and Spring) that: Reflects the Shangri-La brand — purple-and-black forward, premium and confident, with slight reference to pink in intentional places. Spans everyday staples and limited-edition hero pieces Hands cleanly to manufacturers and decorators (vectors, digitized embroidery, tech packs) Works across CT, OH and MO without modification Aesthetic & Competitive References Higher Stitch — cannabis-space capsule collections; elevated, comfort-led positioning (their own line explicitly rejects cartoon graphics and cheap tees — exactly our direction) Jeeter / Jeeter Apparel — limited-edition drop strategy, hype cadence and premium apparel capsules Supreme — streetwear drop model; clean branded staples alongside statement pieces Direction: elevated streetwear.
